ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "job_title_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the job title ID */,
  "email_address" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the employee */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the employee */,
  "father_name" TEXT /* Father's name of the employee */,
  "mother_name" TEXT /* Mother's name of the employee */,
  "nationality_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the nationality ID */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "born_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the employee */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary of the employee */,
  "savings" REAL /* Total savings of the employee */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the employee */,
  "economic_dependents" REAL /* Number of economic dependents */,
  "criminal_record" INTEGER /* Whether the employee has a criminal record */,
  "married" INTEGER /* Marital status of the employee */,
  "children" INTEGER /* Number of children of the employee */,
  "own_house" INTEGER /* Whether the employee owns a house */,
  "own_car" INTEGER /* Whether the employee owns a car */,
  "black_list" INTEGER /* Whether the employee is blacklisted */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department ID */,
  "hiring_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the employee left the company */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supervisor's employee ID */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest level of education achieved by the employee */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "address" TEXT /* Home address of the employee */,
  "tax_id" TEXT /* Tax identification number of the employee */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Current employment status (e.g., active, on leave, terminated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_nationality_id FOREIGN KEY ("nationality_id") REFERENCES nationalities ("nationality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("supervisor_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_job_title_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_title_id") REFERENCES job_titles ("job_title_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_titles" (
  "job_title_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job title */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* The name of the job title */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the job responsibilities */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department ID */,
  "min_salary" REAL /* Minimum salary for the job title */,
  "max_salary" REAL /* Maximum salary for the job title */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_title_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nationalities" (
  "nationality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nationality */,
  "nationality_name" TEXT /* Name of the nationality */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or notes related to the nationality */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO country code for the nationality */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nationality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dependents" (
  "dependent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependent */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee's ID */,
  "relation" TEXT /* Relation of the dependent to the employee (e.g., child, spouse) */,
  "dependent_name" TEXT /* Name of the dependent */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the dependent */,
  "dependent_type" TEXT /* Type of dependent (e.g., spouse, child, parent) */,
  "relationship_status" TEXT /* Relationship status of the dependent (e.g., married, single) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependents_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "criminal_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each criminal record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee's ID */,
  "crime_type" TEXT /* Type of crime committed */,
  "date_of_crime" TEXT /* Date the crime occurred */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Status of the record (e.g., resolved, unresolved) */,
  "court_name" TEXT /* Name of the court where the crime was tried */,
  "sentence" TEXT /* Sentence or punishment given */,
  "case_number" TEXT /* Unique case number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_criminal_records_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee's ID */,
  "asset_type" TEXT /* Type of the asset (e.g. House, Car) */,
  "owned" INTEGER /* Whether the employee owns the asset */,
  "asset_value" REAL /* Value of the asset */,
  "acquisition_date" TEXT /* Date the asset was acquired */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assets_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contact_information" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee's ID */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "contact_type" TEXT /* Type of contact (e.g., personal, work) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address associated with the contact information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contact_information_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salaries" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee's ID */,
  "salary" REAL /* Base salary of the employee */,
  "bonus" REAL /* Any bonuses received by the employee */,
  "pay_frequency" TEXT /* Pay frequency (e.g., monthly, bi-weekly) */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the salary became effective */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the salary is paid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salaries_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee's ID */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company where the employee worked */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title held by the employee */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of employment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of employment */,
  "position_level" TEXT /* Level of the position (e.g., entry, senior, executive) */,
  "reason_for_leaving" TEXT /* Reason for leaving the previous employment */,
  "performance_rating" TEXT /* Performance rating at the previous employment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_history_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blacklist" (
  "blacklist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each blacklist record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee's ID */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for blacklisting */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the employee was added to the blacklist */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the blacklist entry was updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the blacklist entry (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("blacklist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blacklist_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
